content: I'm so excited for my wedding next year. My fiancé, Ryan, and I are planning everything together, from the venue to the music.
Congratulations on your upcoming wedding! That's such a thrilling time. What made you choose your venue?
We're actually getting married at a beautiful mountain resort. Ryan loves mountain biking, and we've had some amazing trips there together. It feels like the perfect place to start our new life.
That sounds like a stunning location. Mountain resorts can be so romantic. Are you planning any special activities for your guests?

We're thinking about organizing a group hike for the day before the wedding. It'll be a great way for everyone to get to know each other and enjoy the scenery. Ryan's friends from his board game group are all coming, and I know they'll love it.
That's a great idea. It's always nice to have some activities that encourage mingling. Do you have a favorite board game that you and Ryan like to play together?
Actually, yes. We love playing chess and Scrabble. It's always so much fun competing against each other. And, of course, we both love baking sourdough together. It's become a special ritual for us.
That sounds like a wonderful way to spend time together. Baking can be so therapeutic. Are you planning on having any special desserts at the wedding?

We're thinking about having a dessert table with all sorts of treats, including some sourdough bread and pastries. My colleague, Dr. Patel, from BioGenesis Pharma, is actually helping us with the catering, which is really kind of her.
That sounds like it's going to be delicious. It's great that you have such supportive friends and colleagues. How did you and Ryan meet?

We met through mutual friends about 3 years ago. It was a blind date, and we just clicked. We've been inseparable ever since. Ryan is actually the one who got me into leatherworking, which has become a hobby we enjoy together.
That's such a sweet story. It's wonderful that you've found someone with similar interests. Leatherworking can be a really rewarding hobby. Do you have any big plans for after the wedding?
Are you and Ryan planning on traveling or starting any new projects together?
We're actually thinking about starting a small garden in our backyard. We've actually just moved to a new place in Boulder, Colorado, and we're excited to make it our own.
